flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion at Hodges University fell 40% between 2006 and 2009 (31.2% → 18.6%).

flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Hodges University rose 13% between 2006 and 2009 ($10.1k → $11.4k).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Hodges University rose 13% between 2006 and 2009 ($10.1k → $11.4k).

flags.label: Median federal debt at exit
flags.summary: Median federal debt at exit at Hodges University rose 11% between 2006 and 2009 ($6.6k → $7.3k).
